UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOANNE C. ALVERGUE, ADMINISTER OF THE ESTATE OF ALEX A. ALVERGUE, DECEASED AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, JACK W. REESE, TERRY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT REESE, TERRY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PL. PRESENT WITH MARY SANCIMINO AS COUNSEL. DEF. JACK ALEXANDER PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEF. TERRY REESE NOT PRESENT DUE TO ILLNESS, BUT GAVE MR. ALEXANDER AUTHORITY TO REACH A SETTLEMENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2678 45TH AVE. - EVICTION STAYED TO 9-30-93 - IF DEFS VACATE BY 9-30-93, PL. WILL WAIVE MONEY JUDGMENT - IF DEFS DO NOT VACATE WRIT MAY ISSUE 10-1-93 WITH MONEY JUDGMENT OF $5,038.50 PLUS DAILY PER DIEM CHARGES OF $26.66. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, JACK W. REESE, TERRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2678 45TH AVE, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1993, IF DEF. FAILS TO VACATE 9-30-93 TOTAL MONEY JUDGMENT OF $4,338.50 PLUS PERDIEM DAMAGES OF $26.66 WILL ISSUE. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
